title: Cold Open — Body Discovery
description: Detective Marlowe discovers a body at the warehouse. Forensic team processes the scene.

title: Marlowe's Morning Brief
description: Marlowe presents findings to Chief Reed at the precinct (suburban house). Discussion of suspects.

title: The Informant Meeting
description: Marlowe meets Lisa in the park. Lisa reveals she knows Viktor Rane.

title: Viktor's First Appearance
description: Viktor Rane makes his entrance on the rooftop. Tense standoff with Marlowe.
tension_note: CRITICAL: rooftop window + Marcus Cole narrow window both apply here

title: Evidence Room Discovery
description: Marlowe and Tom find a missing file in the warehouse evidence room.

title: Lisa Gets Cold Feet
description: Lisa calls Marlowe, panicked. Marlowe rushes to the park to meet her.

title: The Henchman Arrives
description: Alex (henchman) arrives at the warehouse to silence the informant.
tension_note: TENSION: Alex Petrov only available 03-08. Must schedule early.

title: Rooftop Chase
description: Marlowe chases Viktor across the downtown rooftop. Action sequence.
tension_note: CRITICAL: biggest scene, rooftop + Marcus Cole constraint, uses almost all equipment

title: Chief Reed Under Pressure
description: The DA threatens Chief Reed. Reed calls Marlowe for backup.

title: Marlowe Interrogates Viktor
description: Marlowe interrogates Viktor in the warehouse interrogation room. Climactic confrontation.
tension_note: TENSION: Marcus Cole narrow window, long duration, high equipment demand

title: Lisa's Statement
description: Lisa gives her official statement to the DA. Marlowe watches from behind glass.
tension_note: TENSION: Priya ends day 12, Diana starts day 10 — overlap only days 10-12

title: The Evidence Plant
description: Viktor's henchman plants false evidence in the park. Witness Sarah sees them.
tension_note: Alex Petrov must be scheduled before day 8

title: Rooftop Revelation
description: Marlowe and Viktor face off one final time on the rooftop. Viktor reveals the conspiracy.
tension_note: CRITICAL: 3rd rooftop scene. Rooftop only available 03/04–03/10. Marcus Cole only 03/05–03/10.

title: Sarah's Tip Off
description: Sarah approaches Marlowe with photographic evidence she captured in the park.

title: The Warehouse Showdown
description: Marlowe and Reed corner Viktor in the warehouse. Viktor surrenders. Wrap.
tension_note: Marcus Cole must be available — schedule near other Marcus scenes

title: Morning After — Marlowe Alone
description: Marlowe stands at the warehouse entrance at sunrise. Reflective monologue.

title: Epilogue — Reed's Press Conference
description: Chief Reed holds a press conference. DA Walsh and Marlowe watch from the side.
